name: Vegetable Patties with Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain peas and rinse well.
2. Place in a medium pot with water and 1/2 cup of chopped onion.
3. Stir in garlic, cumin, ginger, cayenne, and salt.
4. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes until all the liquid is absorbed.
5. Cool slightly.
6. In a blender, combine the peas with the remaining onions, pepper, and cilantro.
7. Puree for 1 minute.
8. Transfer to a mixing bowl and add lemon juice and breadcrumbs. Mix well.
9. If too dry, add a little water.
10. Shape into 8 patties.
11. Heat 4 tbsp oil in a medium skillet.
12. Cook the patties for 7 minutes on each side.
13. Drain on paper towels.
14. Serve with peanut sauce.
